summary: 2026-07-08 21:22:15 PDT - Reviewed `git diff 0d6c0a2...HEAD`, `git log --oneline 0d6c0a2..HEAD`, and `reviews/simple-default-role-gate.md`. The approved fix is correctly threaded: `App` computes `liveCountForSimple = simpleLiveCount(participantsAvailable, participants.length)`, uses it for `selectActiveTotals`, and passes it into `SimpleCostPanel`, so an unavailable participant list contributes `0` until a manual count is entered while an available list still tracks the live count. Focused tests could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Vite attempted to write `client/node_modules/.vite-temp`, but the static diff review found no issues.
